purpose: Reusable scaffold for CP, CP-SAT, scheduling, routing, assignment, and combinatorial feasibility or optimization deployments.
intended_use: Copy this folder when the selected method is constraint programming or CP-SAT.
Fill model, global constraint, schedule, solver adapter, evaluation, and run-record contracts for the confirmed task.
Use structured records to capture search status, objective, bound, conflicts, branches, feasibility, and solution artifacts.
non_goals: This asset is not a complete runnable CP model.
This asset does not assume CP is better than MILP for every combinatorial model.
This asset does not hide infeasibility, weak objective bounds, or search instability.
This asset must not be used to generate toy or minimal examples that omit real domains, constraints, status handling, progress output, and validation.

top_level_paths.constraints: Global constraint catalog and constraint block contract.
top_level_paths.data: Task, resource, and relation data notes.
top_level_paths.scripts: Foreground run and compact result-collection templates.
